source.name: California WARN Act Notices
source.coverage: California — the largest U.S. state, official EDD WARN filings
source.note: WARN = Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification Act; employers must file for mass layoffs/closures. Coverage is California only; schema is state-extensible.
